output: You balance a desire for control with a need for stability, which can create friction in fast-changing environments.
You combine communication and structured thinking, though you may shift between intuition and logic depending on context.
Under strain, your drive for results can become over-control.
Under strain, your standards can harden into excessive criticism or over-analysis.
Under strain, your preference for stability can become withdrawal from difficult issues.
Under strain, your energy can become diffuse and less focused.
